name: Diadem Warrior Performance Tee
description: The Diadem Warrior Performance Tee uses moisture-wicking polyester blend fabric to keep you cool and dry during intense rallies. Features flatlock seams to reduce chafing, a tagless collar for comfort, and a reflective logo for low-light visibility on evening courts.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors. Do not use fabric softener as it reduces moisture-wicking performance. Hang dry or tumble dry low.
